name: Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>属</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バジリウス
name_jp_tl: Basilius, Familiar of the Cursed Eye
desc: If you control an "Evil Eye" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn this way. During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control an "Evil Eye" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn this way. During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn.
eff: If you control an "Evil Eye" monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn this way. During your Main Phase: You can send 1 "Evil Eye" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Basilius, Familiar of the Evil Eye" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
